name: Corn Roasted with Herb Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
3. Spread each ear of corn with 1 tablespoon of herb butter.
4. Wrap each ear in foil.
5. Roast the corn on the barbecue or under the broiler, 4 inches from the heat, for 30 minutes or until the kernels are tender.
6. Unwrap and remove the husks.
7. Spread the remaining butter over the roasted corn.
